Sr. Director, Machine Learning Engineering (Remote-Eligible)

Capital One

Mclean, VA • On-site, Remote

Job description

Sr. Director, Machine Learning Engineering (Remote-Eligible)

Overview:

At Capital One, we are creating responsible and reliable AI systems, changing banking for good.

What you'll do in the role:

  • Lead and scale a high-performing engineering organization responsible for the Personalization Platform.
  • Define the technical strategy, delivery roadmap, and operating model for a portfolio spanning recommendation systems.

Basic Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or AI plus at least 10 years of experience.
